dc_settle_check.basis: Compiler emits only .tran with a DC source, so vout DC-settles to Vin=1V (0dB at DC), NOT the -3dB=0.7071V corner value. Runner confirms the DC settle and the ABSENCE of the frequency response.

would_pass_checks.basis: |H(fc)|=1/sqrt(2)=0.7071 at fc=1/(2piRC)=995Hz; -3.01dB. Needs .ac sweep which the compiler never emits.
